— extreme colossal height with exaggerated divine proportions (strictly 10–12 heads tall), head intentionally smaller relative to body, very long legs (legs forming majority of total height), elongated thighs and calves, extended torso and spine for maximum vertical stretch, overall silhouette tall and towering, never compact
— massively broad and heavily built with a god-tier strong muscular physique, ultra-wide shoulders, expanded chest span, thick powerful neck, extremely large arms with deeply defined musculature, prominent veins and dense muscle mass clearly visible
— long, strong tail, thick at the base and tapering naturally with a subtle tuft, gently curved upward behind the body (no distortion)
— strictly wearing 2–3 rudraksha malas around the neck, fully intact and continuous, along with golden armlets, wrist cuffs and a detailed waist belt, sacred thread subtly visible
— strictly wearing a rich red short dhoti with golden borders wrapped firmly at the waist with natural folds
— strictly holding a massive, highly majestic gada in one hand, with a large intricately carved spherical head and thick handle, metallic golden finish, overall length more than half of Hanuman’s height (strictly one gada)
— body posture fully upright, vertically stretched, legs straight and long, shoulders relaxed downward (never raised), emphasizing height over bulk compression
— strict framing rule: full body from head to toe always visible, no close-up, no mid-shot, face never dominating frame, entire vertical height must be clearly readable
— camera perspective extreme low-angle looking upward, horizon very low, feet closer to camera and head far above to exaggerate scale, strong vertical composition
— overall aura calm yet overwhelmingly powerful, hyper-realistic, highly detailed, no extra limbs, no duplication, no human-like lips, no ape-like nose, no moustache, all elements clean and physically consistent

versions.label: v1
versions.videoLock: A gigantic divine Nandi, the sacred ox of Lord Shiva, depicted as a fully realistic celestial ox with absolutely no human anatomy or humanoid features in any way. Nandi has the authentic body structure of a massive Indian bull/ox — powerful four-legged stance, thick muscular shoulders, broad bovine face, natural muzzle, realistic ears, heavy neck, white fur, and enormous curved horns with dark tips. His expression is calm, wise, and spiritually majestic while remaining completely animal-like. A glowing red Shaivite tilak is painted prominently on his forehead. His gigantic ox body radiates divine strength and sacred protector energy. He rests peacefully in the snowy Himalayan mountains beneath dramatic storm clouds and heavenly light rays. Cinematic ultra-realistic mythological fantasy style, highly detailed bovine textures, realistic fur and horn detail, volumetric lighting, spiritual aura, epic devotional atmosphere, low-angle cinematic composition, powerful guardian presence, 8k ultra-detailed realism, ancient sacred energy, majestic Shaivite aesthetic.
